title: AdapterDeliveryResult
description: Immutable result returned by adapters after successful delivery. Adapters populate this with platform-native IDs obtained from the external system. Derived from dataclass(frozen=True).

native_message_id.description: Platform-native message ID (e.g. a Matrix event_id). None when not yet available.

native_thread_id.description: Platform-native thread or parent message ID. Reserved — always None at runtime.

native_relation_id.description: Platform-native ID of the related entity. Reserved — always None at runtime.

delivery_note.description: Human-readable context about the delivery. Informational only — not for control-flow.

metadata.description: Adapter-specific immutable metadata about the delivery.
